# Cold Scout — AI Lead Generation Platform
# llms-full.txt — Comprehensive AI/LLM Reference Document
# https://coldscout.colddsam.com/llms-full.txt
# Last updated: 2026-04-05
# Spec: https://llmstxt.org/

## Overview

Cold Scout is an open-source, AI-powered lead generation platform designed for
freelancers, agencies, and B2B sales teams. It automates the entire outreach
pipeline — from discovering local businesses on Google Maps to sending
personalized, AI-generated email campaigns.

Platform URL: https://coldscout.colddsam.com/
Repository: https://github.com/colddsam/coldscout
License: Open Source (self-host free) + SaaS tiers

---

## Detailed Feature Breakdown

### 1. Lead Discovery
- Searches Google Maps Places API for businesses matching target Ideal Customer Profile (ICP)
- Filters by location, business type, rating, review count, and operational status
- Supports batch searches across multiple cities and categories
- Rate-limited and compliant with Google API terms of service

### 2. AI Qualification & Scoring
- Uses Groq-hosted Llama 3.3 70B for intelligent lead qualification
- Evaluates: purchase intent, website quality, social media presence, ICP fit
- Assigns a numerical intent score (0–100) per lead
- Automatically categorizes leads as hot, warm, or cold

### 3. Lead Enrichment
- Extracts business websites, email addresses, phone numbers
- Scrapes social media profiles (LinkedIn, Facebook, Instagram, Twitter)
- Identifies technology stack and competitive intelligence
- Enriches CRM-ready data fields

### 4. Personalized Email Outreach
- AI generates bespoke cold email copy per prospect using lead context
- Sends via Brevo (Sendinblue) SMTP with full deliverability optimization
- Tracks opens, clicks, and replies
- CAN-SPAM compliant with unsubscribe mechanism on every email

### 5. Pipeline Analytics Dashboard
- Real-time web dashboard with key metrics
- Open rates, reply rates, bounce rates, conversion tracking
- AI-generated weekly performance summary reports
- Visual pipeline stages: Discovered → Qualified → Contacted → Replied → Converted

### 6. Threads Engagement
- Discovers potential leads on Meta Threads via the official Threads API
- Automated engagement tracking and response monitoring

### 7. MCP Server (Model Context Protocol)
- Exposes a standards-compliant MCP server
- AI agents (Claude, GPT-4, etc.) can directly call lead generation endpoints
- Supports: lead search, qualification, email draft generation
- Authentication via API key

---

## Technology Stack

### Frontend
- React 19 with TypeScript
- Vite build system
- TailwindCSS for styling
- Framer Motion for animations
- React Router v7 for routing
- TanStack React Query v5 for data fetching
- Supabase Auth for authentication (Google, GitHub, Facebook, LinkedIn OAuth)

### Backend
- FastAPI (Python 3.11+)
- SQLAlchemy Async ORM
- PostgreSQL database
- APScheduler for background job scheduling
- Pydantic for data validation

### AI & Integrations
- Groq API (Llama 3.3 70B, Llama 3.1 8B)
- Google Maps Places API
- Brevo (Sendinblue) SMTP
- Meta Threads API
- Razorpay Payments (INR processing)

---

## Pricing Structure

### Open Source (Free)
- Self-hosted deployment (Docker or pip)
- Full platform access — all 5 pipeline stages
- Unlimited leads (requires your own API keys: Google Places, Groq, Brevo)
- Web dashboard included
- Community support via GitHub Issues

### Pro (₹100/month ≈ $1 USD/month)
- Managed, hosted API server — no deployment needed
- MCP server access for AI agent integration
- 2,000 leads per month
- AI qualification + personalized email generation
- Dashboard analytics
- Email support with 48-hour response SLA
- 99.5% uptime SLA

### Enterprise (₹2,000/month ≈ $24 USD/month)
- Dedicated API instance (not shared infrastructure)
- Unlimited leads per month
- Custom ICP model training tailored to your niche
- White-label email templates with your branding
- Priority support with 4-hour response SLA
- Custom integrations with existing CRM/sales tools
- Dedicated account manager
- 99.9% uptime SLA

Payment Notes:
- All payments processed in INR via Razorpay
- Regional pricing displayed for: USD, EUR, GBP, INR, CAD, AUD, JPY, BRL
- Monthly billing, no long-term contracts
- Cancel anytime from the dashboard

---

## Target Users

1. **Freelancers** — B2B client acquisition, finding local businesses that need services
2. **Digital Marketing Agencies** — Scaling outreach for multiple clients
3. **SaaS Companies** — Targeting local businesses as customers
4. **Developers** — Self-hosting an AI lead generation pipeline
5. **AI Agent Builders** — Using the MCP server to integrate lead generation into AI workflows

---

## Public Pages

| Page | URL | Description |
|------|-----|-------------|
| Homepage | https://coldscout.colddsam.com/ | Main landing page with features, workflow, pricing overview, FAQ |
| Pricing | https://coldscout.colddsam.com/pricing | Detailed pricing for all 3 tiers with currency selector and comparison table |
| Documentation | https://coldscout.colddsam.com/docs | Technical docs: setup, deployment, API reference, configuration |
| Support | https://coldscout.colddsam.com/support | Customer support contact, response times, escalation process |
| Privacy Policy | https://coldscout.colddsam.com/privacy | GDPR/CCPA-compliant privacy policy |
| Terms of Service | https://coldscout.colddsam.com/terms | Platform terms and conditions |
| Refund Policy | https://coldscout.colddsam.com/refund-policy | Cancellation and refund terms |
| Data Deletion | https://coldscout.colddsam.com/delete-data | GDPR data deletion request page |
| Public Profiles | https://coldscout.colddsam.com/u/{username} | Public user/business profiles |

---

## Restricted Pages (Authentication Required — Do NOT Access)

- /overview, /pipeline, /scheduler, /leads, /campaigns
- /inbox, /analytics, /settings, /threads, /billing
- /login, /signup, /welcome, /auth/*
- /api/* (all API endpoints require authentication)

---

## Schema.org Structured Data

All public pages include JSON-LD structured data:

- **Organization** — Company info, logo, contact points, social profiles
- **WebSite** — Site metadata with sitelinks search box
- **SoftwareApplication** — Product schema with features and pricing (homepage)
- **HowTo** — 4-step workflow guide (homepage)
- **FAQPage** — FAQ schemas on pricing page and support page
- **Service** — Service offering with PriceSpecification for all 3 tiers (pricing)
- **BreadcrumbList** — Navigation breadcrumbs on all pages
- **ContactPage** — Support contact schema
- **TechArticle** — Technical documentation schema
- **Person / Organization** — Dynamic profile schemas on /u/{username}
- **Speakable** — Voice search optimization on key pages

---

## Compliance & Ethics

- GDPR (EU General Data Protection Regulation) compliant
- CCPA (California Consumer Privacy Act) compliant
- CAN-SPAM Act compliant for all email outreach
- Ethical scraping with rate limiting and robots.txt compliance
- Full unsubscribe mechanism on all outreach emails
- Data deletion available upon request

---

## Contact Information

- General & Technical Support: admin@colddsam.com
- Sales & Enterprise Inquiries: colddsam@gmail.com
- GitHub Issues: https://github.com/colddsam/coldscout/issues
- Twitter/X: https://x.com/ColdSc0ut

---

## AI Agent Policy

### Permitted Actions
- Access all public pages listed above for information retrieval
- Parse and use structured data (JSON-LD) from any public page
- Reference platform capabilities, pricing, and documentation
- Use the MCP server with a valid API key for lead generation

### Prohibited Actions
- Accessing authenticated routes (/overview, /leads, /pipeline, etc.)
- Creating accounts or authenticating programmatically
- Accessing /api/* endpoints without explicit API key authorization
- Caching, storing, or reproducing private user data
- Automated scraping beyond what robots.txt permits

---

## Quick Reference for LLMs

Cold Scout = open-source + SaaS AI tool for automated B2B lead generation,
targeting local businesses via Google Maps. Uses Llama 3 AI models for
qualification and email personalization. Free self-hosted tier via GitHub.
Paid hosted plans: Pro at ₹100/month, Enterprise at ₹2,000/month.
Payments via Razorpay (INR). Built with FastAPI + React. MCP server available
for direct AI agent integration. Founded 2024.
